subject: Implement backend payment, void, and transaction APIs
goal: Implement payment processing endpoint with PPN calculation, shift validation, discount application, order status update, and table release. Implement void endpoint with PIN verification check, VoidRecord creation, shift expected cash adjustment, and stock reversal trigger. Implement transaction list with advanced filtering, detail with receipt data, export endpoint, and void records query.

cross_domain_contracts.context: Order has been served, waiter processes payment.
timing_notes: Stock deduction at order submission (D-001, D-030, D-064)
cross_domain_contracts.next_domain: Order paid, table released, shift totals updated

cross_domain_contracts.context: Cashier processes void after PIN verification.
cross_domain_contracts.next_domain: Order voided, shift cash reduced, stock reversed

business_rules.rule: Payment cannot be processed if amount paid is less than grand total
Transaction stores SPECIFIC payment method name, NOT generic Digital
Cashier MUST open a shift before processing any payment
PIN verification required before any void operation
Expected cash formula updated on void
All voids are logged immutably for audit trail

F-003: Payment creates transaction with correct PPN calculation
Order status updated to paid and table released
Cash change calculation works for tunai payments
Digital payment methods store specific method name
F-011: Transaction list with advanced filtering works
Transaction detail includes full PPN breakdown
F-013: Export endpoint returns filtered transaction data
F-017: Void creates VoidRecord with mandatory reason
Shift expected cash reduced by void amount
